simple_types.name: Beat_Size_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Beat_Size_Kind is (B_8bit, B_16bit, B_32bit)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: Block_Action_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Block_Action_Kind is
  (No_Action,
   Interrupt,
   Suspend,
   Both
  )
    with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: No_Action
enumeration_literals.description:
Channel will be disabled if it is the last block transfer in the
transaction.

enumeration_literals.name: Interrupt
enumeration_literals.description:
Channel will be disabled if it is the last block transfer in the
transaction and block interrupt.

simple_types.name: Event_Output_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Event_Output_Kind is
  (Disable,
   Block,
   Beat)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: Block
enumeration_literals.description: Event strobe when block transfer complete

enumeration_literals.name: Beat
enumeration_literals.description: Event strobe when beat transfer complete

simple_types.name: FIFO_Threshold_Kind
simple_types.code: type FIFO_Threshold_Kind is (BEAT_1, BEAT_2, BEAT_4, BEAT_8);

documentation.description:
Threshold from which the DMA starts to write to the destination. These
bits have no effect in the case of single beat transfers.

Priority level used for the DMA channel, where a high level has priority
over a low level.

simple_types.name: Step_Selection_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Step_Selection_Kind is (Destination, Source)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: Step_Size_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Step_Size_Kind is (X1, X2, X4, X8, X16, X32, X64, X128)
  with Size => 3;

documentation.description: Trigger action used for a transfer

array_types.name: Descriptor_Section
array_types.code: type Descriptor_Section is array (Channel_Id) of Transfer_Descriptor;

access_types.name: Descriptor_Section_Access
access_types.code: type Descriptor_Section_Access is access all Descriptor_Section;

access_types.name: Transfer_Descriptor_Access
access_types.code: type Transfer_Descriptor_Access is access all Transfer_Descriptor;

subprograms.name: Configure
Configure_Descriptor
Enable
subprograms.code:
procedure Enable (Descriptors : not null Descriptor_Section_Access;
                  Write_Back  : not null Descriptor_Section_Access)

subprograms.name: Set
subprograms.code: function Set (Id : Channel_Id; Int : Interrupt_Kind) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Set_Data_Transfer
